MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Borderline Evaluation of Severity over Time - Modified Satterthwaite (BEST-MS)
MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: The highest rating (5) means that the item caused extreme distress, severe difficulties with relationships, and/or kept you from getting things done. The loweest rating (1) means it caused you little or no problems. Choose the number that indicates how much the item has caused distress, relationship problems, or difficulty with getting things done OVER THE PAST MONTH.

best_ms_1.Description: Worrying that someone important in your life is tired of you or is planning to leave you.

best_ms_2.Description: Major shifts in your opinions about others such as switching from believing someone is a loyal friend or partner to believing the person is untrustworthy and hurtful.

best_ms_3.Description: Extreme changes in how you see yourself. Shifting from feeling confident about who you are to feeling like you are evil or that you don't even exist.

best_ms_4.Description: Severe mood swings several times a day. Minor events cause major shifts in moods.

best_ms_5.Description: Feeling paranoid or like you are losing touch with reality.

best_ms_9.Description: Going to extremes to try to keep someone from leaving you.

best_ms_10.Description: Purposefully doing something to injure yourself or making a suicide attempt.

best_ms_11.Description: Problems with impulsive behavior (not counting suicide attempts or injuring yourself on purpose). Examples include: over-spending, risky sexual behavior, substance abuse, reckless driving, binge eating.

best_ms_11_behaviors___1.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Over-spending

best_ms_11_behaviors___2.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Risky sexual behavior

best_ms_11_behaviors___3.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Substance abuse

best_ms_11_behaviors___4.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Reckless driving

best_ms_11_behaviors___5.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Binge Eating

best_ms_11_behaviors___6.Description: For the above question, please check those behaviors that apply: Other

best_ms_11_other.Description: If you chose other in above question, please explain:

best_ms_12.Description: Temper outbursts or problems with anger leading to relationship problems, physical fights, or destruction of property.

best_score_subscaleA.Description: BEST-MS Subscale A (thoughts & feelings): sum of items best_ms_1-best_ms_8 (each 1-5). n/a if any item missing.

best_score_subscaleB.Description: BEST-MS Subscale B (negative behaviors): sum of items best_ms_9-best_ms_12 (each 1-5). n/a if any item missing.

best_score_finalNoComponentC.Description: BEST-MS total = Subscale A + Subscale B. Subscale C (Positive Behaviors) was not administered, so the standard +15 correction factor is NOT applied. n/a if either subscale is missing.
